metadata.title: Mithril Snapshot UX - Backend & Data Layer Tasks
metadata.description: Extend backend types, pipeline, store observables, and custom chain storage IPC/manager for Mithril UX

phases.name: Backend Type & Pipeline Extensions
phases.description: Extend shared types and backend progress pipeline to carry file counts and error stage

tasks.title: Extend shared types
tasks.description: Add filesDownloaded, filesTotal to MithrilBootstrapStatusUpdate and stage to MithrilBootstrapError

tasks.title: Update mithrilProgress parser
tasks.description: Preserve raw files_downloaded and files_total in MithrilProgressUpdate instead of only converting to percentage

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapService progress
tasks.description: Include filesDownloaded/filesTotal in _updateStatus() calls. Annotate errors with stage: 'download' | 'verify' | 'convert'

tasks.title: Annotate node-start failure stage
tasks.description: Set error.stage to 'node-start' in handleDiskSpace.ts where failed status is reported

tasks.title: Update backend unit tests
tasks.description: Verify filesDownloaded/filesTotal preservation and stage annotation on errors

phases.name: Store & Container Updates
phases.description: Extend MobX store with download metadata observables and computed properties

tasks.title: Add store observables and computeds
tasks.description: Add @observable filesDownloaded, filesTotal and @computed bytesDownloaded, throughputBps to MithrilBootstrapStore. Update _updateStatus to assign file counts.

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapPage progress metadata wiring
tasks.description: Pass filesDownloaded/filesTotal and derived bytesDownloaded/throughputBps from MithrilBootstrapStore through the container to the component contract for the upcoming progress UX.

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapPage chain storage wiring
tasks.description: Pass chain storage state and actions through to the component once custom storage store actions exist.

phases.name: Custom Chain Storage Location
phases.description: IPC channels, ChainStorageManager, symlink handling, and store actions for custom chain/db directory redirection

tasks.title: Add chain storage shared types
tasks.description: Add ChainStorageConfig and ChainStorageValidation types to mithril-bootstrap.types.ts

tasks.title: Add chain storage IPC channels
tasks.description: Define SET/GET_CHAIN_STORAGE_DIRECTORY channels in api.ts with main-side handlers and renderer-side clients

tasks.title: ChainStorageManager - validation and config
tasks.description: Create chainStorageManager.ts with validate(targetDir) to check writable/sufficient space/not inside stateDir, and getConfig() to read chain-storage-config.json

tasks.title: ChainStorageManager - setDirectory and migrateData
tasks.description: Add setDirectory(targetDir) to migrate data, create symlink (POSIX or NTFS junction), persist config. Add migrateData(from, to) with fs.move() and cross-device fallback. Use fs.lstat() to detect symlinks vs real directories.

tasks.title: ChainStorageManager - resetToDefault and verifySymlink
tasks.description: Add resetToDefault() to copy data back, remove symlink, remove config. Add verifySymlink() to check target exists on startup and return diagnostic if broken.

tasks.title: Add validate-only chain storage IPC channel
tasks.description: Introduce a non-destructive chain storage validation IPC request so the directory picker can show validation feedback without triggering migration/symlink side effects.

tasks.title: Add setDirectory rollback safety
tasks.description: Harden setDirectory with rollback/restore behavior when symlink switch fails after migration so stateDir/chain remains usable.

tasks.title: handleDiskSpace lint debt cleanup
tasks.description: Clean up legacy ts-ignore/any/shadowed-name lint debt in handleDiskSpace.ts to reduce maintenance friction while preserving behavior.

tasks.title: Integrate ChainStorageManager with disk space and downloads
tasks.description: Resolve symlinks via fs.realpath() before checkDiskSpace(). Pass custom directory as workDir to MithrilBootstrapService. Use resolved real paths in _installSnapshot() comparison.

tasks.title: Add chain storage store actions
tasks.description: Add observables (customChainPath, chainStorageValidation, isChainStorageLoading, storageLocationConfirmed) and actions (setChainStorageDirectory, resetChainStorageDirectory, loadChainStorageConfig, confirmStorageLocation) to MithrilBootstrapStore

tasks.title: Add startup symlink verification
tasks.description: Call verifySymlink() during app init. Surface warning through MithrilBootstrapStore if broken symlink detected.

tasks.title: Test startup symlink verification IPC path
tasks.description: Add low-priority tests for main chainStorage IPC startup verification flow to ensure verifySymlink warnings are emitted for invalid custom targets.

tasks.title: Unit tests for ChainStorageManager
tasks.description: Test validate, setDirectory, resetToDefault, migrateData (including cross-device fallback), and verifySymlink with mocked fs
